summary: Regression-tested the admin analytics refactor (analytics_service.py) and marketplace quote Pydantic validation. Created /app/backend/tests/test_admin_analytics_refactor.py with 14 tests covering response shape, summary cross-consistency, array length == days, caching identity, auth enforcement, days validation, and smoke checks on /api/admin/{stats,users,notaries,notaries/pending,analytics/revenue}. Also re-ran existing /app/backend/tests/test_marketplace_pricing.py (45 tests). Result: 14/14 new tests PASS and 45/45 marketplace tests PASS (one transient 502 on first run passed on retry).

minor.issue: Flaky 502 Bad Gateway observed once during full-suite run; passed immediately on retry. Likely preview-env ingress/cold-start, not code.

critical_code_review_comments: analytics_service.py is clean: pure async builders, no _id leakage, divisor handled for cents→dollars, summary cross-consistent with arrays (verified via assertions).

Endpoint /api/admin/analytics/comprehensive correctly delegates to builders, preserves cache_service usage, identical payload shape vs. pre-refactor expectations (all 9 top-level keys + 8 summary keys present).
Cache verified: second identical call returns byte-identical payload in <1s.
Marketplace QuoteRequest correctly rejects empty state_code (min_length=2) and invalid urgency Literal with 422; valid path returns full price breakdown.

Minor: build_summary recomputes total_stripe/total_crypto from rounded array values; route handler ALSO computes total_stripe (line 724) and passes to build_payment_distribution — values may differ from summary.stripe_revenue by ≤$0.01 due to rounding of per-day entries vs. raw sum. Cosmetic only; not a regression.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing approved notary fetched from /api/marketplace/notaries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics refactor (services/analytics_service.py) is regression-clean. Reusable test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_analytics_refactor.py covers all admin analytics + smoke endpoints + marketplace quote validation. Re-run before any further admin/analytics changes.
